# v2.5.0 — Remove harness/rules bundle

### Removed

- **`harness/rules/`** — generic Python coding conventions removed (too specialized); projects maintain their own style
- Legacy `harness/rules/` pruned on install/update from pre-0.6.0 installs

### Changed

- Template version `0.6.0`
- Workflow docs no longer reference `harness/rules/`

---

### 移除

- **`harness/rules/`** — 移除通用 Python 编码规范（过于专化）；编码风格由项目自行维护
- `install`/`update` 会清理旧版 `harness/rules/`

### 变更

- 模板版本 `0.6.0`
- 工作流文档不再引用 `harness/rules/`
